name: Fit Kaka
shortDescription: AI nutrition assistant for tracking calories, macros, and meal insights via WhatsApp.
description: An AI-powered nutrition assistant that enables users to track calories and macros instantly by sending food photos or text messages via WhatsApp.
Built using Next.js and Node.js, leveraging the Gemini API for advanced image recognition and automated nutritional analysis of meals.
Tech stack includes MongoDB for meal history, Tailwind CSS with Framer Motion for a high-contrast dashboard, and WhatsApp Cloud API for a seamless, no-app-required user experience.

name: TestimonialsLo
shortDescription: Customer testimonial manager with video uploads, payment flows, and secure storage.
description: A platform that helps businesses, freelancers, startups gather and manage customer video, text testimonials efficiently.
Built with Next.js frontend and Node.js backend, uses Mux for seamless video uploads and processing.
Tech stack includes Prisma with PostgreSQL for database management, Zod for input sanitization, and Razorpay for payment processing.

name: Canvas Board
shortDescription: Real-time collaborative whiteboard for team brainstorming and design with instant sync.
description: A real-time collaborative whiteboarding platform that allows multiple users to brainstorm, architect flows, and design wireframes on a shared infinite canvas.
Built with a Next.js frontend and Node.js backend, utilizing WebSockets to handle instant synchronization of shapes, drawings, and ideas across all connected clients.

Tech stack features PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM for persistent storage of board states, supporting a suite of tools including freehand pencil drawing and geometric shape primitives, with the entire codebase structured as a turborepo.

name: Syncoo
shortDescription: Team management platform to streamline team tasks and issues tracking
description: A modern project management and issue-tracking platform designed to streamline task organization and real-time status monitoring.
Developed with Next.js 16 and TypeScript, featuring a responsive dashboard built with Shadcn/ui and TanStack Table for efficient data handling.
Tech stack integrates Grok AI for intelligent issue analysis, Tailwind CSS for the interface, and automated Email Notifications to keep teams updated on project milestones.

name: Secure Vault
shortDescription: Encrypted password manager built with MERN stack for secure credential storage.
description: A secure password manager using cryptography, helping users store and manage their passwords securely.
Built using Mern stack, for encryption of passwords, secure vault uses cryptojs library.
This is my first MERN stack project, got indepth of how does encryption works.

name: Blogito
shortDescription: A blog platform for sharing stories, built with React, Tailwind CSS, and email verification.
description: Blogito is a blog website built to share experiences and learnings with the world.
Built with React, Tailwind CSS and javascript. For email verification Blogito uses node mailer.
Users can seamlessly create their blog posts of any domain and share it globally.
